overview: Isher Gym is a mobile-first fitness companion app for a local gym. It helps users track workouts, follow diet plans, calculate BMI, join fitness challenges, set reminders, and earn rewards through a gamification system. The app features bilingual support (English + Hindi), a modern design, and a feedback system with a sliding carousel on the home page.
features: Feedback form with name/photo and avatar fallback
Sliding feedback carousel on home page
Hero section with rotating gym photos
Exercise photos with duration and timing info
Diet section with Hindi support and veg/non-veg options
Gamification Hub with points and levels
